output: T1 completed. I read the agent files, the relevant create-task resolvers, frontend model/default sources, and the harness files, then checkpointed the batch result. Key findings: image generation model routing is `qwen-image`/`qwen-image-2512`/`z-image` -> `qwen_image` or `qwen_image_style` / `qwen_image_2512` / `z_image_turbo`, otherwise default `wan_2_2_t2i`; travel-between-images currently forwards `model_name` verbatim but the app maps UI model IDs `wan-2.2` / `ltx-2.3` / `ltx-2.3-fast` to worker names `wan_2_2_i2v_lightning_baseline_2_2_2` / `ltx2_22B` / `ltx2_22B_distilled` before calling `create-task`; character-animate defaults to `480p`; and `supabase/functions/_tests/harness/diverse-gen-test.ts` exists but only covers 4 current generation cases, not the new families.

task_updates.executor_notes: Verified all requested source surfaces before any implementation. Resolver-param/default findings: `z_image_turbo_i2i` expects `image_url`, optional `prompt`, `strength`, `enable_prompt_expansion`, `numImages`, `loras`, `shot_id`, `based_on`, `source_variant_id`, `create_as_generation`, `tool_type`; `magic_edit` expects `prompt`, `image_url`, optional `negative_prompt`, `resolution`, `seed`, `in_scene`, `shot_id`, `output_format`, `enable_sync_mode`, `max_wait_seconds`, `enable_base64_output`, `tool_type`, `loras`, `based_on`, `source_variant_id`, `create_as_generation`, `hires_fix`, `qwen_edit_model`, `numImages`; `image_upscale` expects `image_url`, optional `generation_id`, `source_variant_id`, `scale_factor`, `noise_scale`, `output_format`, `shot_id`; `video_enhance` expects `video_url`, `enable_interpolation`, `enable_upscale`, optional `interpolation`, `upscale`, `shot_id`, `based_on`, `source_variant_id`; `character_animate` expects `character_image_url`, `motion_video_url`, optional `prompt`, plus `mode` and `resolution`. FLAG-002 resolved with source evidence: the travel resolver does not map friendly IDs itself, and app callers convert `wan-2.2` / `ltx-2.3` / `ltx-2.3-fast` to worker names before hitting `family: 'travel_between_images'`. FLAG-003 resolved: default character-animate resolution is `480p` in both resolver and frontend defaults. FLAG-004 resolved: `supabase/functions/_tests/harness/diverse-gen-test.ts` exists, but today it only covers 4 generation scenarios and will need expansion later.

sense_check_acknowledgments.executor_note: Yes. FLAG-002 was resolved from `travelBetweenImages.ts` plus frontend model-mapping sources, FLAG-003 from both resolver and frontend character-animate defaults, and FLAG-004 from the existing harness file and its current test-case list.
